mapper.select: SELECT 'GENERAL' AS image_type, ai.public_url, ai.source_type, ai.display_order, ai.width, ai.height FROM tourism_source.attractions a JOIN tourism_source.attraction_images ai ON ai.attraction_no = a.no WHERE CAST(a.content_id AS text) = #{contentId} AND ai.is_active = true AND nullif(ai.public_url, '') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ai.display_order ASC, ai.created_at ASC, ai.id ASC LIMIT 4

WITH target_attraction AS ( SELECT no, area_code, si_gun_gu_code FROM tourism_source.attractions WHERE CAST(content_id AS text) = #{contentId} LIMIT 1 ), award_candidates AS ( SELECT 'AWARD' AS image_type, p.public_url, 'CONTEST_AWARD' AS source_type, 5 AS display_order, p.width, p.height, 1 AS match_priority, p.award_year, p.award_rank, p.created_at FROM target_attraction t JOIN tourism_source.contest_award_photo_matches m ON m.attraction_no = t.no JOIN tourism_source.contest_award_photos p ON p.id = m.photo_id WHERE m.match_scope = 'ATTRACTION' AND m.match_status = 'SELECTED' AND m.is_selected = true AND p.upload_status = 'UPLOADED' AND p.rights_status = 'APPROVED' AND nullif(p.object_key, '') IS NOT NULL AND nullif(p.public_url, '') IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'AWARD' AS image_type, p.public_url, 'CONTEST_AWARD' AS source_type, 5 AS display_order, p.width, p.height, 2 AS match_priority, p.award_year, p.award_rank, p.created_at FROM target_attraction t JOIN tourism_source.contest_award_photo_matches m ON m.sido_code = t.area_code AND (m.gugun_code IS NULL OR m.gugun_code = t.si_gun_gu_code) JOIN tourism_source.contest_award_photos p ON p.id = m.photo_id WHERE m.match_scope = 'REGION' AND m.match_status = 'SELECTED' AND m.is_selected = true AND p.upload_status = 'UPLOADED' AND p.rights_status = 'APPROVED' AND nullif(p.object_key, '') IS NOT NULL AND nullif(p.public_url, '') IS NOT NULL ) SELECT image_type, public_url, source_type, display_order, width, height FROM award_candidates ORDER BY match_priority ASC, award_year DESC, award_rank ASC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1
